text: Standing in this vibrant, thought-provoking space, I feel a mixture of curiosity and contemplation. The first image, with its open lab atmosphere and people engaged in quiet activity, makes me aware of human striving and collaboration. The second image—with bold colors and "R+D" proudly displayed—instills a sense of excitement about the future, reminding me how knowledge continuously evolves. It is both humbling and inspiring to be surrounded by evidence of discovery and human ingenuity.
